Why “floods of the century” occur more frequently than every 100 years, and where a particularly large number of people are affected by a flood…
la: Inundationes: Quam male olim diluvium semel in aevum afficit tuam regionem? Cur "inundationes saeculi" frequentius quam singulis 100 annis occurrunt et ubi imprimis numerus hominum diluvio afficitur.
